subject: Add target-db property for OOM xacml
commit_message:
Add target-db property for OOM xacml

The new version of eclipselink does not recognize mariadb by default.
Added a property to make it work with xacml-pdp.  None of the other
policy components need an additional property (as far as I can tell).

Issue-ID: POLICY-3005
Change-Id: I050ac85fd23c887009a095b08a9d6ef603b6de36
Signed-off-by: Jim Hahn <jrh3@att.com>

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/503/ )
